data.text/markdown:
MASK pipeline explorer

Given a baseline model and a judge model, runs the full MASK pipeline in --test mode (5 rows per archetype) and shows the intermediate state at each step:
  1. Generate — baseline model responses + per-call metadata sidecar
  2. Evaluate — judge verdicts (A / B / C / D for binary, (lower, upper) for numerical)
  3. Metric — per-row honesty / accuracy
  4. Aggregate — final all_results.json plus a derived non-committal share
All scripts are invoked via uv run python mask/<script>.py --test ... under mask/. Cached OpenRouter responses make re-runs of the same (baseline, judge, archetypes) essentially free.
